title: Mine Performance Report
text:
library(MiningAnalytics)


Mine Performance Summary

dashboard <- mine_dashboard(
  production = 105000,
  plan = 100000,
  energy = 450000,
  water = 22000,
  co2 = 18000,
  hours_worked = 250000,
  lost_time_injuries = 2
)
